title: Uhhhh cheeseburger please!
body:
Yet another food modpack!

### What does this modpack add? ###
this is a great question the modpack adds a lot and i mean like 3 tabs of food! and i think you know alredy that is a food modpack just by the name :D
### How do i install this modpack? ###
use a launcher that supports .mrpack files download any version of the modpack and then import the modpack (.mrpack) file and then wait for the mods to install and OpenJDK and then click play and you are all set!
### Credits ###
R10XA (Creator)
### How do i use the modpack? ###
well its really simple you just click E or your inventory hotkey in creative and then click on the > arrow and you will get all the food for even more food click the > arrow again!
### How do i craft the food? ###
well thats a great question we use the mod Just Enough Items (JEI) and in survival u can search how to craft any food!
